title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex XG
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / UniFi Switches
description: UniFi Switch Flex XG from Ubiquiti is a fully manageable L2 UniFi Switch with (4) 10 Gb Ethernet ports and (1) Gigabit LAN supporting PoE IN (802.3af ). The very compact and fanless desktop design is complemented by information LEDs indicating the status of the line. The switch can be powered via the first port - PoE IN or via USB-C on the backside (4) 1G/10G LAN port + (1) 100 /1G LAN port 82 Gbps switching capacity Desktop design, fanless Power over PoE (802.3af) or USB-C (5 V/5 A) Management via UniFi Controller - supported from version 6.1.67 The major difference between the UniFiSwitch series and the EdgeSwitch series is the management - WebGUI management of EdgeSwitch switches is replaced by the UniFi Controller on UniFiSwitch models Device Power adapter 5 V/5 A (1.5m cable)
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (4) 100M/1G/2.5G/5G/10Gbps + (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3at Power type PoE, USB-C PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 25 Power via connector/terminal 5V / 5A Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 45 Width [mm] 185 Height [mm] 32 Depth [mm] 135 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 82 MAC address table 16000 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 61
